tasks.subject: Task 1: Foundation stylesheets (tokens + motion)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create design-system/css/tokens.css and motion.css — all custom properties and keyframes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/css/tokens.css", "design-system/css/motion.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system && npx esbuild css/tokens.css css/motion.css --bundle --outdir=/tmp/css-check --allow-overwrite", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both files parse under esbuild", "all spec tokens present", "reduced-motion guard present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Component CSS — restyled core vocabulary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create design-system/css/components.css restyling all existing b-* classes to the expressive look, keeping every class name.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/css/components.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system && npx esbuild css/components.css --bundle --outdir=/tmp/css-check --allow-overwrite", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all core b-* classes defined", "expressive dropdown/panel/button treatments", "no-radius reset preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Component CSS — new components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append modal, toast, tooltip, skeleton, switch, checkbox, inputs, select to components.css.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/css/components.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system && npx esbuild css/components.css --bundle --outdir=/tmp/css-check --allow-overwrite", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all new component classes exist", "modal glass+brackets+entrance", "input focus glow"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Ambient background module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Productionize the approved flythrough as design-system/ambient/vigilant-ambient.js (ESM, dependency-free) + .d.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/ambient/vigilant-ambient.js", "design-system/ambient/vigilant-ambient.d.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node --check design-system/ambient/vigilant-ambient.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mount/destroy API", "sov cache + silent degradation", "perf guards (hidden, reduced-motion, minWidth, fpsCap)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: React package scaffold + build pipeline + Button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create @vigilant/ui package: package.json, tsconfig, build.mjs, vitest config, styles.css, index.ts, Button + test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/react/package.json", "design-system/react/build.mjs", "design-system/react/src/components/Button.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npx vitest --run && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tests green", "dist has js+css+d.ts", "Button variants work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Layout components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NavBar, NavMenu, Breadcrumbs, PageHeader, Section, Panel, Grid, TabStrip, Footer with tests + exports.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/react/src/components/NavBar.tsx", "design-system/react/src/components/Panel.tsx", "design-system/react/src/components/__tests__/layout.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npx vitest --run && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["9 layout components render b-* classes", "Panel glass/brackets", "tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Data components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** StatStrip/StatBlock, KeyValueRow, Table/TableRow, Badge, ProgressBar, EmptyState, Eyebrow + tones.ts + tests + exports.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/react/src/components/Stat.tsx", "design-system/react/src/components/tones.ts", "design-system/react/src/components/__tests__/data.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npx vitest --run && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shared Tone/toneClass", "ProgressBar clamps", "tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Actions + feedback components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ButtonGroup, Banner, Toast/ToastStack, Modal, Skeleton with tests + exports.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/react/src/components/Modal.tsx", "design-system/react/src/components/Toast.tsx", "design-system/react/src/components/__tests__/feedback.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npx vitest --run && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Modal esc/overlay/close all fire onClose", "Banner/Toast tones", "tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: AmbientBackground wrapper + fonts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** React wrapper mounting/destroying the ambient module; bundle JetBrains Mono woff2 with @font-face.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/react/src/components/AmbientBackground.tsx", "design-system/react/src/fonts.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npx vitest --run && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mount/destroy lifecycle", "fonts bundled in dist", "tsc clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Demo harness (REVIEW GATE)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vite demo page rendering every component with realistic EVE content over the live ambient background. REVIEW GATE: user eyeballs npm run demo before commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/react/demo/main.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npx vite build demo", "acceptanceCriteria": ["demo builds", "all components rendered", "user approved the look"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Package README + final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** design-system/README.md + full clean-state verification. After this, /design-sync runs in MAIN session.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["design-system/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd design-system/react && npm test -- --run && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build && npx vite build demo", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README idiom section accurate", "clean-state full suite green"]}
```
